steps.title: Substitute into the formula
steps.content:
Use the cone volume formula with $V=\pi$ and $h=12$. Substitute the given values before solving for the radius:
$$\pi=\frac{1}{3}\pi r^2(12)$$
$$\pi=4\pi r^2$$

steps.title: Solve for the radius
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $4\pi$, then take the positive square root because a radius is positive:
$$r^2=\frac{\pi}{4\pi}=\frac{1}{4}$$
$$r=\frac{1}{2}$$
The answer is A.
